name: iso42001.report
label: ISO 42001 Compliance Report
description: Generated compliance report aggregating test results with analysis and recommendations.

fields.name: reportType
fields.description: Report type: COMPLIANCE, BIAS, MONITORING, AUDIT, SUMMARY

fields.name: testRuns
fields.description: Test runs included in this report

fields.name: sections
fields.description: Report sections (executive summary, methodology, results, mitigations)

fields.name: modelsEvaluated
fields.description: List of model endpoint names evaluated

fields.name: controlAreas
fields.description: ISO 42001 control areas covered (A.5.4, A.5.5, etc.)

fields.name: mitigationActions
fields.description: JSON-encoded mitigation actions for FLAG/FAIL results

fields.name: exportedPdf
fields.description: Reference to the exported PDF (data.data with contentType=application/pdf)

fields.name: certification
fields.description: Certification record if report has been certified
